narrative.headline: 2022 Volkswagen Passat: brakes lead a small set of owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed just 9 complaints with NHTSA, so the sample is small. Service brakes are the single most reported area at 33% (3 reports), followed by the engine, power train, steering, and electrical system, each with 2 reports (22%). None of these complaints are tied to a crash, fire, injury, or death.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: The most reported area: 3 reports (33%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Owners describe rear brakes wearing out earlier than expected, so check brake condition on a test drive.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 2 reports (22%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. A complaint mentions repeatedly needing to add oil. A minor but recurring area to ask about.

issues.blurb: 2 reports (22%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. A small share of the overall complaints.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 2 reports (22%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. One owner reports all four doors unlocking on their own while parked.
